goal: Remove the 'Related Internal Links' section from the Celtic Cross (full) reading result
fix: appendReadingInternalLinks() early-returns when state.mode==='full' (10 links cluttered the celtic result). Daily/Question keep it for SEO crawl.
verified: chrome MCP celtic result: no .panel--internal-links, body no longer mentions 'Related Internal Links'/'ลิงก์ที่เกี่ยวข้อง'. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.

goal: Login deck-reward popup re-showed on repeat logins; want first-login-only + a 'welcome back' on returning logins
root_cause: markSeen() was only called on the Claim CTA, so dismissing/reloading without claiming never marked it → the 'start your journey / Veila Tarot' reward re-appeared every login.
fix: maybeShowLoginReward(user,lang,{fresh}) now: first-EVER login (account created <5min ago AND not seen) → deck reward + markSeen() ON SHOW; any returning login → markSeen() + a light 'Welcome back 🐾' toast, shown ONLY on a genuine fresh sign-in (auth.js passes fresh = SIGNED_IN && !prevUser, so it doesn't fire on every page-load restore). New i18n loginWelcomeBack (EN/TH) + .mt-welcome-toast style.
verified: node --check all; chrome MCP: login-reward module loads. Full OAuth state matrix not exercised here — logic verified by reading + created_at heuristic. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: created_at heuristic means a returning user (old account) gets the welcome toast immediately, not one more deck reward — addresses the '10th login still showing' case.
